title: Founder's Associate (Technical)
must_haves: 1-3 years in product, engineering, startups, or similar
Hands-on experience building with AI and working with data
Comfortable with code & data — build internal tools and scripts (professional coding 'a plus', not mandatory)
Strong analytical skills and commercial judgment
Work with ambiguity across multiple responsibilities; work directly with co-founders/CTO
met_strengths: Founder's-associate experience is a direct title/role match (worked directly with founders, turned ambiguity into workstreams)
Agentic-AI / Claude Code building maps exactly to 'build internal tools and AI workflows to automate manual tasks'
Commercial judgment from GTM/fundraising; London-based, UK auth
Coding-comfort bar is 'a plus', not a hard gate — Ryan's agent-building clears the spirit of it
hard_blockers_note: Domain is clean-energy / heat-pump installation (climate tech), not crypto/Web3; experience band (1-3 yrs) is junior for Ryan's ~6.4 yrs.
met_strengths_caveat: Technical framing leans toward someone who codes daily; Ryan's strength is agent orchestration, not professional SWE.
one_line_verdict: Best title/role fit on the slice — Founder's Associate + AI-tool-building is squarely Ryan's lane and coding is only 'a plus' — but it's pitched junior (1-3 yrs), in a climate-tech (not crypto) domain, and leans technical-builder.
fetch_note: Listing details from PitchMeAI (1-3 yrs, £40-60K, comfortable-with-code-not-mandatory, London hybrid). Company is Installio (heat pumps / clean energy, installio.co.uk); not on Ashby. Direct careers: join.installio.co.uk/jobs — could not confirm the exact per-role canonical URL there, so direct_url is the company job board.
